title: Magnificently Crunchy Saudi Arabian Pine Nut Fritters
description: A crunchy and velvety Saudi Arabian dish featuring pine nuts, perfect for a brunch mood, this ovo-vegetarian-friendly recipe is a must try. It is made with agemono-deep-fry technique for the perfect crunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Fold in the chopped pine nuts.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy.
